2.12 Right to know score                This is more precise than the indicator 2.12. It constitutes the right of the
                                        data subject to ask for the specific score achieved in a certain situation.
2.13 Bankruptcies disclosed 3           The longer information can be stored, the weaker data protection might
years                                   become. Therefore, we included the obligation to erase adverse data after 3
                                        years at the latest.
2.14 Delinquencies                      The same holds for this indicator: if information has to be erased within a
disclosed 3 years                       time frame up to or equal to 3 years, we granted a one. If not due to longer
                                        storage times, we granted a zero.
2.15 Judgements, judicial measures      This indicator follows the logic of the two aforementioned ones. If
 3 years                                information has to be erased within a time frame up to or equal to 3 years,
                                        we granted a one. If not due to longer storage times, we granted a zero.
